headline: Nasdaq 100 Drops After Nvidia's Earnings, Oil Reclaims $100: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. stocks slipped at midday Thursday as Treasury yields snapped back and crude oil climbed above $100 a barrel on signs that U.S.-Iran peace talks have stalled. IBM surged more than 8% after winning a $1 billion CHIPS Act quantum-computing award, while Walmart, Deere and Intuit slumped on disappointing prints.

headline: This Week In E-Commerce - AI Collaboration Boosts Team Efficiency and Customer Experience
summary: Cint has announced an expanded collaboration with Salesforce to enhance AI-powered support through Slack, their cloud-based team communication platform. This development is part of a broader strategic initiative that integrates Salesforce's AI CRM capabilities with Cint's custom product configuration engine. The collaboration aims to streamline operations by enabling teams to manage accounts and conduct go-to-market activities directly within Slack. The first phase has introduced an AI suite...

headline: AI has fundamentally changed the tempo of cybersecurity, says F5 CEO
summary: Francois Locoh-Donou, CEO of F5, says many cybersecurity vulnerabilities are now being exploited by hackers before they are disclosed by the code developer. He warns that advanced AI models like Anthropic's Claude Mythos are further accelerating and widening that advantage for hackers.

raw.headline: AI has fundamentally changed the tempo of cybersecurity, says F5 CEO
raw.summary: Francois Locoh-Donou, CEO of F5, says many cybersecurity vulnerabilities are now being exploited by hackers before they are disclosed by the code developer. He warns that advanced AI models like Anthropic's Claude Mythos are further accelerating and widening that advantage for hackers.
